operational_knowledge_units.title: InitializeTote API adds a tote to the system using ToteId and StationId
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that InitializeTote requires a ToteId and a StationId and is used to add a tote to the system.
observed_evidence: Bullet text: 'InitalizeTote: Requires a ToteId and a StationId to add a tote to the system.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: API capability for totes: InitializeTote requires ToteId and StationId to add a tote to the system.

operational_knowledge_units.title: ExchangeTote API exchanges a specific tote by ToteName
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that ExchangeTote requires a ToteName and will exchange that specific tote.
observed_evidence: Bullet text: 'ExchangeTote: Requires a ToteName and will exchange that specific tote.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: API capability for totes: ExchangeTote requires ToteName and exchanges that specific tote.
